title: Handle meat product in cold stores
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Handle meat product in cold stores demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Identify requirements for storage of chilled and frozen meat products
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify requirements for storage of chilled and frozen meat products?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify requirements for storage of chilled and frozen meat products.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement control measures for health, safety and food safety risks.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Wear personal protective equipment (PPE) appropriate for handling chilled and frozen meat product.
